Give everything to Anahata ❤️
Força Barça!

  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi
The root package of the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides the core message and part domain primitives for the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the provider-agnostic LLM connectivity and generation interfaces.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.adapter
Provides adapter classes for converting between the core domain model and the native Gemini API types.
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
Provides the provider implementation for the Hugging Face Inference API.
uno.anahata.asi.internal
Provides internal utility classes for the framework.
uno.anahata.asi.minimax
Provides the provider implementation for the MiniMax API using their Anthropic-compatible interface.
uno.anahata.asi.modal
Provides a pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.adapter
Provides specialized adapters for translating between Anahata's model-agnostic domain objects and OpenAI-compatible wire formats.
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.config
Provides the configuration and metabolic management components for the Anahata Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.provider
Swing-based providers and models for managing AI model registries.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider used by uno.anahata.asi
    Class
    Description
    AbstractAiProvider
    The abstract base class for all AI model providers, now with model caching.
    RequestConfig
    The definitive, model-agnostic configuration object for a single API request.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider used by uno.anahata.asi.agi
    Class
    Description
    AbstractAiProvider
    The abstract base class for all AI model providers, now with model caching.
    AbstractModel
    The abstract base class for a specific AI model (e.g., "gemini-1.5-pro-latest").
    GenerationRequest
    A simple, immutable record that encapsulates all the information required for a model to generate content: the configuration and the conversation history.
    RequestConfig
    The definitive, model-agnostic configuration object for a single API request.
    Response
    A standardized, model-agnostic response received from an AI model provider.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider used by uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
    Class
    Description
    FinishReason
    A standardized, model-agnostic enum representing the reason why a model stopped generating content.
    Response
    A standardized, model-agnostic response received from an AI model provider.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider used by uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
    Class
    Description
    AbstractAiProvider
    The abstract base class for all AI model providers, now with model caching.
    AbstractModel
    The abstract base class for a specific AI model (e.g., "gemini-1.5-pro-latest").
    FinishReason
    A standardized, model-agnostic enum representing the reason why a model stopped generating content.
    GenerationRequest
    A simple, immutable record that encapsulates all the information required for a model to generate content: the configuration and the conversation history.
    RequestConfig
    The definitive, model-agnostic configuration object for a single API request.
    Response
    A standardized, model-agnostic response received from an AI model provider.
    ServerTool
    Represents a server-side tool provided by an AI model (e.g., Google Search, Code Execution).
    StreamObserver
    A simple interface for observing a stream of values, typically used for asynchronous token streaming from an AI model.
    ThinkingLevel
    Standardized, model-agnostic enum representing the level of "thinking" or reasoning tokens that the model should generate.
    TokenizerType
    Defines the supported tokenizer strategies for the Anahata ASI.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider used by uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
    Class
    Description
    AbstractModel
    The abstract base class for a specific AI model (e.g., "gemini-1.5-pro-latest").
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider used by uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
    Class
    Description
    AbstractModel
    The abstract base class for a specific AI model (e.g., "gemini-1.5-pro-latest").

    Class
    Description
    AbstractAiProvider
    The abstract base class for all AI model providers, now with model caching.

    The abstract base class for a specific AI model (e.g., "gemini-1.5-pro-latest").

    The definitive, model-agnostic configuration object for a single API request.
    Response
    A standardized, model-agnostic response received from an AI model provider.
    ServerTool
    Represents a server-side tool provided by an AI model (e.g., Google Search, Code Execution).
    StreamObserver
    A simple interface for observing a stream of values, typically used for asynchronous token streaming from an AI model.
